title: nagas #5065
definition:
1) to press, drive, oppress, exact, exert demanding pressure
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to press, drive
        1a2) to exact
        1a3) driver, taskmaster, ruler, oppressor, tyrant, lord,
             exactor of tribute (participle)
    1b) (Niphal) to be hard pressed
